create.title: Create Your Workspace
create.description: Welcome to Qarote! Let's start by creating your first workspace. Workspaces help you organize your RabbitMQ servers and collaborate with your team.
create.tagsPlaceholder: Add tags to organize your workspace
create.tagsHint: Use tags like "production", "development", or "testing" to organize your workspace
create.invitePlaceholder: Type an email and press Enter to add
create.inviteHintWithLimit: You can invite up to {{count}} members on your current plan
create.upgradeToInvite: Upgrade to the Developer or Enterprise plan to invite team members.
create.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

createForm.title: Create New Workspace
createForm.description: Create a new workspace to organize your RabbitMQ servers and collaborate with your team.
createForm.tagsPlaceholder: Add tags to organize your workspace
createForm.invitePlaceholder: Type an email and press Enter to add
createForm.inviteHintWithLimit: You can invite up to {{count}} members on your current plan
createForm.upgradeToInvite: Upgrade to the Developer or Enterprise plan to invite team members.

inviteLinks.title: Share Invitation Links
inviteLinks.description: Email is not configured. Share these links manually with your team members.
inviteLinks.localhostWarningDescription: Your server URL (FRONTEND_URL) is set to localhost. This link was adjusted to use your current browser address, but you should update FRONTEND_URL in your .env file to your server's network address (e.g., http://192.168.1.50:8080) and restart Qarote.

invites.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

error.createFailed: Failed to create workspace. Please try again.
